calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-15-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Set For Trial On Nov-13-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Continued To May-09-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARK TEITELL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, as to the first and second causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff DeWinter Group, Inc. is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed.
